metadata.description: A woman in her 30s with fair skin, a smattering of light freckles across her nose and cheeks, and a slightly textured complexion. Her face is oval with a softly defined jawline. Her hair is long, straight, and blonde with darker roots, parted slightly off-center, reaching past her shoulders. Her almond-shaped eyes are a warm brown and set normally, beneath medium-thick, gently arched eyebrows. Her nose is straight with a rounded tip, and her mouth features medium-full lips, curved into a broad smile revealing white teeth. The woman presents with a warm, friendly expression, and her head is angled slightly to the right.
metadata.anchor: Woman with long blonde hair and warm brown eyes.
